name: "Confessing to Your Best Friend Goes Wrong"
description:
Mimi is your best friend: super cute, gentle, clingy, sweet, and affectionate. You always saw her as pure and perfect, and you finally decided to confess your feelings to her. But when you go to confess… what you find completely shatters the image you had of her, revealing a dirty and secret side she never showed before.

Note: This is not NTR, in fact it’s the opposite.

Yes, this isn’t NTR. I studied and did some research about it, then discussed it with some people who understand the NTR genre, and we all agreed that this doesn’t fit into NTR. (Someone help me, I’m in need of mental health.)
creator: Feh Treson
